title: Redstone Magic
description: Do you think that redstone is only good for mechanisms? With this mod, you'll explore the magical side of redstone.
body:
**Please help with the translation of the project**

# Features of the Mod
The Mod adds a magical version of redstone: Cursed Redstone. Start the adventure in this Mod with this material. Then you'll have to learn the rituals, various tools and mechanisms.

# Custom crafts

<details>
<summary>Crafts</summary>

_Cursed Redstone_ - click the Soul Crasher on the Redstone Block

_Enligment Shard_ - click the Cursed Redstone on the Pictogram Block

</details>
